zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Tailboys於大約1508年出生在英國林可爾史爾吉時，她的父親George Taylboys44歲，母親Elizabeth Gascoigne39歲。她於1529年3月與Edward Dymoke在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1566年9月16日在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Tailboys于大约1508年出生在英国林可爾史爾吉时，她的父亲George Taylboys44岁，母亲Elizabeth Gascoigne39岁。她于1529年3月与Edward Dymoke在英国英格兰林可爾史爾吉结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1566年9月16日在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾。

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Tailboys was born about 1508, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, her father, George Taylboys, was 44 and her mother, Elizabeth Gascoigne, was 39. She married Edward Dymoke in March 1529, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 10 daughters. She died on 16 September 1566, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Tailboys est née environ 1508, à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, George Taylboys, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Gascoigne, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Dymoke en mars 1529, à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 septembre 1566, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Tailboys um 1508 in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Taylboys 44 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Gascoigne 39. Sie hat im März 1529 in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Edward Dymoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. September 1566 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Tailboys è nata il circa 1508 nel Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, George Taylboys, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Gascoigne, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Edward Dymoke nel marzo 1529, nel Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 16 settembre 1566, nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Tailboysが約1508年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメで生まれた時，父George Taylboysは44歳，母Elizabeth Gascoigneは39歳であった。1529年3月にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメでEdward Dymokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1566年9月16日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールンカストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Tailboys(이)가 대략 1508년 영국 링코실르 키에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Taylboys(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Gascoigne(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1529년 3월 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 키에서 Edward Dymoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1566년 9월 16일 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호른카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Tailboys nasceu aproximadamente 1508, em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Taylboys, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Gascoigne, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Dymoke em março de 1529, em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1566, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Tailboys родилась около 1508 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени George Taylboys было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gascoigne, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Dymoke марта 1529 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она умерла 16 сентября 1566 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Tailboys nació aproximadamente 1508, en Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, George Taylboys, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Gascoigne, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Edward Dymoke en marzo de 1529, en Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1566, en Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
